## Docs Scope

- [ ] README or docs index
- [ ] Setup/self-hosting
- [ ] Architecture/runtime
- [ ] Security/safety
- [ ] Release/downloads
- [ ] Contributor flow

## Public-Facing Audit

- [ ] No maintainer-local paths
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private logs, or database URLs
- [ ] No private personal/business workspace details
- [ ] Public wording says Jarvis OS
- [ ] Compatibility leftovers are documented intentionally

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run docs:audit`
- [ ] Links checked manually where relevant
- [ ] Screenshots/images exist if referenced

## Remaining Risk

What might still be unclear to a new self-hoster or contributor?
